title: Complexity-scaled extended thinking beyond architect/security roles
description: Extended thinking (--thinking) is gated to architect-morty and security-morty on Opus only (delegate.py:1179, 1809-1815). Reviewer and tester work on L/XL tickets involves exactly the kind of multi-step reasoning that benefits from a thinking budget, and reasoning quality scales with allocated thinking tokens. Enabling thinking for any role on L/XL complexity (where Opus is already selected) and scaling the budget by complexity would improve hard-ticket outcomes without affecting the XS/S/M fast path.
proposed_changes: Generalize the thinking-enable predicate (around delegate.py:1179/1809-1815) from a role allowlist to: role in {architect, security} OR ticket complexity in {L, XL}. Keep the Opus + CLI-feature-detection guards. Extend the existing budget mapping (1120-1135, 2128-2131) so XL=10k, L=6k, M=3k (only when thinking is on), and keep XS/S with thinking disabled. Continue extracting and audit-logging <thinking> blocks (1968-1977).
